originalTitle: ‘She is retired’: Do I dip into my 401(k) to pay my mother’s $30,000 credit-card debt?
summary: “I want her to live on her Social Security instead of using it to pay off her credit-card debt.”
content: “I want her to live on her Social Security instead of using it to pay off her credit-card debt.”
chineseTitle: “她退休了”：我是否需要动用 401(k) 来偿还我母亲 30,000 美元的信用卡债务？
chineseSummary: “我希望她靠社会保障生活，而不是用它来偿还信用卡债务。”
chineseContent: “我希望她靠社会保障生活，而不是用它来偿还信用卡债务。”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
